time_start.description: The time the user action started in milliseconds, relative to the start of the transcript.

time_end.description: The time the user action ended in milliseconds, relative to the start of the transcript.

description.description: A description of the user action (e.g. "User clicked on the home button")

confidence.description: The confidence that the user action occurred

interaction_target.description: Description of the element that was interacted with (eg. a button label)

cursor_position.description: The position of the cursor in the video

x.description: The x-coordinate of the cursor position in the video

y.description: The y-coordinate of the cursor position in the video

page_title.description: The title of the page/screen/section the user action occurred on

page_location.description: The URL/path/title of the page/screen/section the user action occurred on

viewport_width.description: The width of the viewport in pixels at the time of the event

viewport_height.description: The height of the viewport in pixels at the time of the event

frame_description.description: Description of the visual information associated with the action (eg. what's on the page)

transcript_id.description: The ID of the transcript where the user action occurred

study_id.description: The ID of the study where the user action occurred

task_id.description: The ID of the task where the user action occurred
